name: Blue Apron Holdings, Inc.
description: Blue Apron Holdings, Inc. operates a direct-to-consumer platform that delivers original recipes and fresh, seasonal ingredients directly to customers' doorsteps. The company's meal kits include pre-portioned ingredients and step-by-step instructions, designed to help home cooks prepare nutritious meals. Blue Apron also offers an e-commerce market selling kitchen tools, curated wines, and pantry items, aiming to make home cooking accessible and enjoyable.
